channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Empress Street permit holder TP sprayed, 9th July
item.description:
Empress Street permit holder TP sprayed Opp LP 02
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A hole outside 17 Brunswick Crescent, 9th July
item.description:
A deep hole has appeared and it is possible it might be a sinkhole in the making

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Brunswick Crescent, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and subsidence, 9th July
item.description:
Getting noticeable worse every day. Hazard on strategic cycle route.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Marsala Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yesterday's fly-tipping plus new addition, 9th July
item.description:
Yesterday on Limewood Rd, we reported flytipping of the same traffic bollard that is still here today, the estate agents board has disappeared in its place is shelving/furniture unit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Minchenden Crescent, Southgate

item.title: Repeated incidents of dog waste, 9th July
item.description:
Dog diarrhea down the pavement on the middle section of Cyrena Road. A hazard given it’s a school run route.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cyrena Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown branches Reference No 9722617, 9th July
item.description:
The branches are protruding out into the Lane and scratching my car and those of others. It badly needs cutting back please I was guven the above reference by uour offices
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Gardens, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weed over growing pathway and into personal gardens on road, 9th July
item.description:
Weed bushes in the image is starting to grow into gardens of property owners on Upper Abbey Road. The biggest issue is it is spreading so far and fast it is blocking rear entrances to some gardens. Need clearing down as not been treated for several months or year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Abbey Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone park on my privet driveway, 9th July
item.description:
Someone is parking illegally on my private driveway. I’ve spoken to him about it several times, but he ignores me and laughs brazenly.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on junction box on corner of Lassell Street and Banning Street, 9th July
item.description:
Graffiti on the junction box on the corner of Lassell Street and Banning Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Banning Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 9th July
item.description:
Clearly abandoned - mould growing inside. Been there for as long as I can remember - more than a year.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 large wood pallets, 9th July
item.description:
One week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Glenhurst Avenue, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Flats 1-12 Russell Chambers, Bury Place, 9th July
item.description:
The e-bikes/scooters are left outside of the designated bay. They encroach into the residents electric vehicle charging bay and the Doctors bay. This is a daily o occurrence. Whilst they are tidied up in the late afternpon/ evening the problem recurs the following day. It's all 3 companies who are at fault. Lime Forest and Voi.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Bury Place, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
